Items.Title: Amazon Lightsail 容器服务访问 Amazon ECR 私有存储库 | Amazon Lightsail container service access to Amazon ECR private repositories
Items.Description:
您可以让您的 Amazon Lightsail 容器服务访问同一 AWS 区域中的 Amazon ECR 私有存储库。 然后，您可以将映像从您的私有存储库部署到您的容器服务。

注意- 我们建议您使用 Lightsail 控制台来管理对 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的容器服务访问。 使用控制台时，您不必手动将 IAM 角色委托人的 Amazon 资源名称 (ARN) 添加到您的私有存储库

所需权限
将管理 Lightsail 容器服务对 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限的用户必须在 IAM 中具有以下权限策略之一。

授予对任何 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限 以下权限策略授予用户权限以配置对任何 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限。 

 { "Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [ { "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess", "Effect": "Allow", "Action": [ "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:DescribeRepositories", "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy" ], "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:*:AwsAccountId:repository/*" } ] }

在策略中，将AwsAccountId替换为您的 AWS 账户 ID 号。

授予对特定 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限 以下权限策略授予用户权限以配置对特定 AWS 区域中特定 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限。

 { "Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [ { "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess", "Effect": "Allow", "Action": [ "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:DescribeRepositories", "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy" ], "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:AwsRegion:AwsAccountId:repository/RepositoryName" } ] }

在策略中，将以下示例文本替换为您自己的：

您的 Lightsail 容器服务必须与您要访问的私有存储库位于同一 AWS 区域。

以下是使用示例值填充的权限策略示例。

 { "Version": "2012-10-17", "Statement": [ { "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess", "Effect": "Allow", "Action": [ "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:DescribeRepositories", "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy", "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy" ], "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:us-east-1:111122223333:repository/my-private-repo" } ] }

使用 Lightsail 控制台管理对私有存储库的访问
完成以下过程以配置 Lightsail 容器服务对 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问。

  1. 登录到Lightsail 控制台。
  2. 在 Lightsail 主页上，选择容器选项卡。
  3. 选择要为其配置对 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限的容器服务的名称。
  4. 选择图像选项卡。
  5. 在页面的Amazon ECR 私有存储库部分中选择以下选项之一：

  • 添加存储库以授予您的容器服务对 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的访问权限。 要完成添加存储库，请继续执行此过程的第 6 步。

  • 移除以从之前添加的 Amazon ECR 私有存储库中移除对您的容器服务的访问权限。 从您的容器服务到存储库的访问会立即被删除。

  1. 在出现的下拉列表中，选择您要访问的私有存储库。
  2. 选择添加。 然后，Lightsail 会自动将 IAM 角色委托人 ARN 添加到您选择的 Amazon ECR 私有存储库的权限策略中。 这将授予您的容器服务访问私有存储库及其映像的权限。 在出现的模式指示该过程已完成并且您可以选择继续之前，请不要关闭浏览器窗口。
  3. 激活完成后选择继续。 所选的 Amazon ECR 私有存储库列在页面的 Amazon ECR 私有存储库部分中。 要使用存储库中的映像，请指定容器服务部署页面上显示的 URI 格式。 在 URI 中，将 example 标记替换为要部署的映像的标记。

哈林德·塞拉🇭🇲 - 伊曼纽尔·巴托莱西 - May 13 5月13日



原文:

Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR) is an AWS managed container image registry service that supports private repositories with resource-based permissions using AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). You can give your Amazon Lightsail container services access to your Amazon ECR private repositories in the same AWS Region. Then, you can deploy images from your private repository to your container services.

Note- We recommend that you use the Lightsail console to manage container service access to Amazon ECR private repositories. When you use the console, you don't have to manually add the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role principal to your private repositories

Required permissions
The user who will manage access for Lightsail container services to Amazon ECR private repositories must have one of the following permissions policies in IAM.

Grant access to any Amazon ECR private repository The following permissions policy grants a user permission to configure access to any Amazon ECR private repository.

{
 "Version": "2012-10-17",
 "Statement": [
 {
 "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess",
 "Effect": "Allow",
 "Action": [
 "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
 "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy"
 ],
 "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:*:AwsAccountId:repository/*"
 }
 ]
}

In the policy, replace AwsAccountId with your AWS account ID number.

Grant access to a specific Amazon ECR private repository The following permissions policy grants a user permission to configure access to a specific Amazon ECR private repository, in a specific AWS Region.

{
 "Version": "2012-10-17",
 "Statement": [
 {
 "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess",
 "Effect": "Allow",
 "Action": [
 "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
 "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy"
 ],
 "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:AwsRegion:AwsAccountId:repository/RepositoryName"
 }
 ]
}

In the policy, replace the following example text with your own:

AwsRegion — The AWS Region code (for example, us-east-1) of the private repository. Your Lightsail container service must be in the same AWS Region as the private repositories that you want to access.

AwsAccountId — Your AWS account ID number.

RepositoryName — The name of the private repository for which you want to manage access.

Following is an example of the permissions policy populated with example values.

{
 "Version": "2012-10-17",
 "Statement": [
 {
 "Sid": "ManageEcrPrivateRepositoriesAccess",
 "Effect": "Allow",
 "Action": [
 "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
 "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy",
 "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy"
 ],
 "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:us-east-1:111122223333:repository/my-private-repo"
 }
 ]
}

Manage access to private repositories using the Lightsail console
Complete the following procedure to configure access for a Lightsail container service to an Amazon ECR private repository.

  1. Sign in to the Lightsail console.
  2. On the Lightsail home page, choose the Containers tab.
  3. Choose the name of the container service for which you want to configure access to an Amazon ECR private repository.
  4. Choose the Images tab.
  5. Choose one of the following options in the Amazon ECR private repositories section of the page:

  • Add repository to grant access for your container service to an Amazon ECR private repository. To finish adding the repository, continue to step 6 of this procedure.

  • Remove to remove access for your container service from a previously added Amazon ECR private repository. Access from your container service to the repository is immediately removed.

  1. In the dropdown that appears, select the private repository that you would like to access.
  2. Choose Add. Lightsail takes a few moments to activate the Amazon ECR image puller IAM role for your container service, which includes a principal Amazon Resource Name (ARN). Lightsail then automatically adds the IAM role principal ARN to the permissions policy of the Amazon ECR private repository that you selected. This grants your container service access to the private repository and its images. Don't close the browser window until the modal that appears indicates that the process is completed and you can choose Continue.
  3. Choose Continue when the activation is completed. The selected Amazon ECR private repository is listed in the Amazon ECR private repositories section of the page. To use an image from your repository, specify the URI format that is displayed on the page in your container service deployment. In the URI, replace the example tag with the tag of the image you want to deploy.

Harinder Seera 🇭🇲 - May 2

Emanuele Bartolesi - May 13

Hiện nay, có chuỗi phòng trọ cho thuê được xem là một hình thức đầu tư ít rủi ro vì tránh mất giá đồng tiền。 Nó có thể chống được lạm phát và có sức đề kháng tốt ngay cả khi thị trường bất động sản gặp khó khăn. Nó có thể chống được lạm phát và có sức đề kháng tốt ngay cả khi thị trường bất động sản gặp khó khăn。

Đầu tư được coi là một phương án tuyệt vời giúp tăng thu nhập của bạn. Nó có thể giúp chúng ta thoát khỏi trạng thái bế tắc của dòng tiền. Mặc dù đầu tư là mạo hiểm hơn tất cả các lĩnh vực còn lại nhưng nó luôn giúp chúng ta tạo ra nguồn thu nhập rủng rỉnh. Cụ thể, bạn có thể tham gia đầu tư các lĩnh vực sau:

Kinh doanh Homestay

Với nguồn thu nhập từ dịch vụ lưu trú cho khách du lịch tất nhiên sẽ cao hơn và đều đặn hơn so với việc bạn đầu tư vào những lĩnh vực không ổn định khác.

Items.Title: CSS中的px和em和rem的区别 | px and the difference between em and rem in CSS
Items.Description:
达马尼塔

发表于如果您在 CSS 中使用font-size ，那么您可以在声明中使用不同的值表示法：

  1. 例如：

    时间：

    <div class="container"> <div class="child_inside_container"></div>

    如果我们在 div.container 块中创建另一个 div 块并给这个块的宽度为 3 em，它将是 60px 宽（1em 是 20px，20px * 3 = 60px）。

    雷姆：

    html { font-size: 20px;

    如果我们给任何标题、段落或其他元素的字体大小为 1 rem，它将是 20px：

    h2, p, span { font-size: 1rem;

    所有 h2、p 和 span 元素的字体大小为 20px。

    如果我们给一个元素宽度为 10 rem，高度为 5 rem：

    article { width: 10rem; height: 5rem;

    这个元素将是 200 像素宽和 100 像素高，因为 20 x 10 = 200 和 20 x 5 = 100。



原文:

damanita

Posted on May 27

If you use font-size in CSS then you can use a different notation of your value in your declaration:

  1. px - the number of pixels high you want the text to be

  2. em - equal (similar, like, identical) to the font size set on the parent element of the current element we are styling

  3. rem - is equal to the font size set on the root element of the document, not the parent element

For example:

em:

<div class="container"> <div class="child_inside_container"></div>

</div>

.container { font-size: 20px;

}

.child_inside_container { width: 3em;

}

If we make another div block within the div.container block and give this block a width of 3 em, it will be 60px wide (1em is 20px, 20px * 3 = 60px).

rem:

html { font-size: 20px;

}

If we give any headings, paragraph or other element a font size 1 rem, it will be 20px:

h2, p, span { font-size: 1rem;

}

All h2, p, and span elements will have a font size of 20px.

If we give an element a width of 10 rem and a height of 5 rem:

article { width: 10rem; height: 5rem;

}

This element will be 200 px wide and 100 px high, because 20 x 10 = 200 and 20 x 5 = 100.

彩带

发表于如何去除厨房油脂？ 解决了！

厨房可能是我们家中很难保持清洁的地方。 用过的盘子、叉子、杯子和平底锅已经够烦人的了。 您仍然可以在几分钟内使用洗碗机清洁它们，点击几下。 清洁中最具挑战性的部分是柜台、橱柜和后挡板上积聚的油污。 您必须使用抹布或其他东西清洁各处。 但是您会发现很难清洁墙壁、柜台和后挡板上的污渍和油脂。 在这里，我找到了保持厨房油免费的 3 种最佳解决方案。

保持厨房无油的最佳解决方案 - 厨房防油贴纸
保持厨房清洁的最经济、最方便的方法是Coloribbon 厨房防油贴纸。 这种贴纸专为防油而设计。 您会发现很难将油留在贴纸上。 这种即剥即贴的贴纸具有自粘性和防水性。 戴上后，您无需担心柜台、橱柜、抽屉或后挡板上的油渍、油脂或食物残渣。
厨房墙贴最高可承受 250 摄氏度。 如何使用 Coloribbon 厨房防油贴纸
使用后挡板墙贴非常容易。 只需清洁并干燥后挡板、橱柜或台面的表面即可。 把它剪成你想要的大小。 将其堆放并去除任何气泡。

每次烹饪时都要清洁

每次使用厨房时，最好清洁您的柜台、橱柜和后挡板，无需厨房防油贴纸的帮助。 立即清洁可以轻松去除上面的油脂和食物残渣。 油也会吸引其他类型的污垢，冷却后的油脂更难去除。 这就是为什么你必须立即清理它们。

使用抽油烟机
如何去除厨柜或其他地方的油脂？ 另一个答案是即使你已经完成了烹饪，也要使用你的抽油烟机。 你们中的大多数人在烹饪时可能会使用抽油烟机。 但你可能只在烹饪时运行它。 事实上，当你吃完饭时，空气中的烟雾和浮油并没有消失。 它们仍然存在，然后会加载到您的柜台、橱柜和后挡板上。 所以你应该在你吃完饭后再运行你的抽油烟机 10 分钟。

How to Get Rid of Kitchen Grease? Solved!

The kitchen might be the place in our home pretty hard to keep clean. Used plates, forks, cups, and pans are annoying enough. You can still use a dishwasher to clean them within a few minutes and a few clicks. The most challenging part of the cleaning is the oil building up on counters, cabinets, and backsplash. You have to use a dishcloth or something to clean everywhere. But you will find it too difficult to clean stains and grease on your wall, counters, and backsplash. Here I have found the 3 best solutions to keep kitchen oil free.

Best Solution to Keep Kitchen Oil Free - Kitchen Oil Proof Stickers
The most budget-friendly and convenient method to keep your kitchen clean is Coloribbon Kitchen Oil Proof Sticker. This kind of sticker is designed for keeping oil away. You can find it is hard to leave the oil on the sticker. This kind of peel-and-stick sticker is self-adhesive and water-resistant. After putting it on, you never need to worry about the oil stains, grease, or food residues on your counters, cabinets, drawers, or backsplash.
Features of Coloribbon Kitchen Oil Proof Stickers

Easier than ever to clean: You can use a duster cloth or wash with soapy water to wipe the oil and dirt easily. Versatile use:Suitable for cabinets, countertops, TV stands, dining tables, closets, dishwashers, refrigerators, appliances, etc. Waterproof, Mildew-Resistant, and Fire-Resistant: It will not deform. The kitchen wall stickers can stand up to 250 Celsius. Easy to cut: Cut the kitchen stickers and make them the shape you want easily.

Easy To apply and remove: When you do not need kitchen oil proof stickers, you can remove them easily.

How to Use Coloribbon Kitchen Oil Proof Stickers
It is pretty easy to use the backsplash wall stickers. Just clean and dry surface of your backsplash, cabinet or countertop. Cut it out the size you want. Pile it and remove any air bubbles.

Clean Each Time You Cook

You’d better clean your counters, cabinets, and backsplash every time you use the kitchen without the help of oil proof sticker for kitchen. An immediate cleaning will make it easy to remove the grease and food residue on them. Oils also attract other types of dirt and the cooled grease is much harder to be removed. That’s why you have to clean them immediately.

Use Range Hood
How to get rid of grease in kitchen cabinets or elsewhere? Another answer is to use your range hood even when you have finished the cooking. Most of you might use a range hood when cooking. But you might only run it when you are cooking. In fact, the smoke and floating oil in the air do not disappear when you finish your meal. They still exist and will load on your counters, cabinets, and backsplash then. So you should run your range hood another 10 minutes after you get your meals done.

Items.Title: 常见的 JavaScript 错误以及如何处理它们 | Common JavaScript Errors and How To Handle Them
Items.Description:
不管前端应用程序的代码多么完美，它的一些功能都会受到影响，尤其是当我们开始测试它在不同浏览器之间的兼容性时。 这些错误的发生主要是因为开发人员在他们的代码中使用现代 Web API 或 ECMA 6 脚本，即使在一些最流行的浏览器版本中，这些脚本也不兼容浏览器。 在本文中，我们将探讨开发人员在其前端应用程序中经常遇到的错误，以及如何最小化或消除这些错误。

未捕获的类型错误

如果您在 Google Chrome 中调试 JavaScript 代码，您可能已经多次看到此错误。 当您调用方法或读取未定义对象的属性时，会发生这种情况。

尽管由于多种原因可能会发生此错误，但一个常见的原因是渲染 UI 组件时元素的状态未正确初始化。 不仅在 JavaScript 中，在使用 React JS 或 Angular jS 开发的应用程序中也会出现此问题。 让我们看看如何修复它。

修复- 应该在构造函数中使用合理的默认值初始化状态。

你知道什么是CSS 未设置值吗？ 加载和运行时错误

就像 Java 和 C++ 有编译错误一样，JavaScript 也有加载错误。 在浏览器中加载之前，开发人员将无法检测到突出的错误。 加载后，当显示语法错误的错误消息时，可以很容易地发现它。 当解释器遇到一些它无法理解的代码时，就会发生运行时错误。 加载和语法错误都很简单，但可能导致脚本意外停止。

修复——一旦发生这些错误，浏览器中的调试器可用于找出代码中的错误。 拼写错误的语法，即键入时遗漏的分号，通常会导致此错误。

这是一个主要的跨浏览器兼容性问题，通常与 Safari 浏览器相关。 通常在 Safari 中，会发生错误，并在控制台中显示一条消息，指出 null 不是对象。 当在空对象上调用方法时会发生这种情况。 可以在 Safari 的开发者控制台中轻松测试这一点。 如果您手边没有 mac 系统，可以在这里 LambdaTest 试用。 我们拥有 2000 多种浏览器和操作系统组合，包括 Mac 和 Safari 浏览器，您可以在其中测试您的网站的浏览器兼容性。

未定义表示未分配的变量。 使用严格相等运算符可以验证它们是否不相等。

当开发人员在加载之前尝试使用 DOM 元素时，也会发生此错误。

修复——事件监听器是此类错误的完美解决方案。 一旦页面准备就绪，它就会通知开发人员。 一旦事件监听器被触发，init() 方法就可以使用 DOM 元素。

此外，请查看CSS widows orphans CSS widows 和 orphans 基本上是让您控制何时跨页或列中断行的属性。 您定义在中断之前或之后必须保留的行数。

解析错误

通常当在 JavaScript 中使用硬编码值时，在编译期间，代码会抛出解析错误。 这主要发生在代码中存在硬换行符时。 编译器将换行符解释为行结束分号。

修复- 始终使用括号和分号使您的代码更易于阅读并避免断行。

当未捕获的 JavaScript 错误跨越域边界时，它违反了跨域策略并导致脚本错误。 未捕获的错误是那些未在 try-catch 中捕获并在 window.onerror 处理程序中冒泡的错误。 一个常见的例子是，如果您的 JavaScript 代码托管在 CDN 中，则任何未捕获的错误都会报告为脚本错误。 这是一种内置于浏览器中的安全协议，用于防止数据跨域传递，否则不允许。

修复— Try-catch 应始终用于处理错误

不要忘记单击并检查CSS 缩放！ 当调用未定义的方法时，通常会在 Internet Explorer 中发生此错误。 它可以与 Chrome 中发生的未定义函数错误进行比较。 对于使用 JavaScript 命名空间的 Web 应用程序，此错误非常常见。 例如，this.isAwesome() 在所有浏览器中都能正常工作，但在 Chrome 中会抛出异常。

修复- 使用命名空间时，可以通过使用实际命名空间作为前缀来避免此错误

由于未定义变量的长度属性，此错误主要发生在 Chrome 中。 通常，数组定义了它的长度。 但是当数组的变量名保持隐藏或数组未初始化时，就会发生此错误。

修复- 可以通过 2 种方式修复此错误

  • 在声明函数的语句中，应删除参数。

  • 该函数应在声明的数组中调用。

浏览器编译 JavaScript 时发生的大多数错误是未定义或空类型错误。 如果开发人员在 Typescript 这样的静态检查系统中使用严格的编译器，则可以避免这些错误。 它会给出一个类型未定义但预期的警告。 即使没有使用 Typescript，也可以使用保护子句在使用对象之前检查对象是否未定义。



原文:

JavaScript is criticized as a language that is quite difficult to debug. It doesn’t matter how perfect the code of a front-end application is, some of its functionality will get impacted especially when we get down to test it’s compatbility across different browsers. The errors occur mostly because many times developers use modern Web API or ECMA 6 scripts in their codes that are not yet browser compatible even in some most popular browser versions. In this article, we will look at the errors commonly faced by developers in their front-end application and how to minimize or get rid of them.

Uncaught TypeError

If you are debugging your JavaScript code in Google Chrome, you may have seen this error for several times. This occurs when you call a method or read a property on an undefined object.

Although this error can occur due to many reasons, a common one is the state of an element not properly initialized when UI components are rendered. Not only in JavaScript, this issue can also occur in an application developed using React JS or Angular jS. Let’s see how to fix it.

Fix — The state should be initialized using a reasonable default value in constructors.

Do you know what is CSS unset value? The unset value of a CSS property, which is the same as “inherit” if a property is inherited or “initial” if a property is not inherited, has no initial value.

Loading and Runtime Errors

Just like Java and C++ has compile errors, JavaScript has loading errors. Developers will not be able to detect a prominent error until it is loaded in the browser. Once loaded, it can be spotted easily when an error message is displayed showing syntax error. Runtime errors occur when the interpreter comes along some code that it cannot understand. Both loading and syntax errors are simple but can result in unexpected halting of script.

Fix — Once these errors occur, debugger in the browser can be used to find out the error in code. Misspelt syntax, a semicolon that is missed while typing, generally causes this error.

Null Object Error in Safari

This is a major cross browser compatibility issue typically associated with Safari Browsers. Often in Safari, an error occurs, and a message is displayed in the console that null is not an object. This occurs when a method is called on a null object. One can test this easily in the developer console of Safari. If you don’t have a mac system handy, you can try it out at here LambdaTest. We have more than 2000 combinations of browsers and operating systems, including Mac and Safari browsers, where you can test your website for browser compatibility.

Null and undefined are not same in JavaScript. Null means that the object has a blank value. Undefined means a variable that is not assigned. Using a strict equality operator can verify that they are not equal.

This error also occurs when the developer tries to use a DOM element before it is loaded.

Fix — An event listener is the perfect solution for this type of errors. It notifies the developer once the page is ready. The init() method can use the DOM elements once the event listener is fired.

Also, check out CSS widows orphans The CSS widows and orphans basically are properties that let you control when lines break across pages or columns. You define the number of lines that must be left before or after the break.

Parse Errors

Often when hard coded values are used in JavaScript, during compilation, the code throws parse error. This occurs mostly when hard line breaks exist in the code. The compiler interprets line breaks as line ending semi-colons.

Fix– Always use parenthesis and semi-colons to make your code easier to read and avoid breaking lines.

(unknown): Script error

When the domain boundary is crossed by an uncaught JavaScript error, it violates the cross-origin policy and results in Script error. Uncaught errors are those which are not caught inside try-catch and bubble up on the window.onerror handler. A common example is, if your JavaScript code is hosted in CDN, any uncaught error gets reported as Script error. This is a security protocol built in browsers to prevent passing of data across domains which is not permitted otherwise.

Fix — Try-catch should always be used to handle errors

Don’t forget to click and check CSS zoom! css-zoom is a non-standard method to scale content using only CSS which means faster render times and simplified code.

TypeError — Property Not Supported by Object

This error usually occurs in Internet Explorer when an undefined method is called. It can be compared to the undefined function error that occur in Chrome. For web applications that use JavaScript namespacing, this error is quite common. IE cannot bind “this” keyword to the current namespace. For example, this.isAwesome() works properly in all browsers but throws an exception in Chrome.

Fix — When using namespacing, this error can be avoided by using the actual namespace as a prefix

TypeError — Cannot Read Length

This error occurs mostly in Chrome due to an undefined variable’s length property. Normally an array has its length defined. But when the variable name of an array remains hidden or if the array is not initialized, this error happens.

Fix — This error can be fixed in 2 ways

  • In the statement where the function is declared, parameters should be removed.

  • The function should be invoked in the array that is declared.

Most of the errors that occur when the browser compiles the JavaScript are either undefined or null type errors. If the developer uses the strict compiler in a static checking system like Typescript, these errors can be avoided. It will give the warning that a type is not defined but expected. Even if Typescript is not used, guard clauses can be used to check if the objects are undefined before they are used.

本指南帮助您使用 PostgreSQL 作为数据库设置新的 .NET 6 项目。

脚手架一个项目

dotnet new webapi -o myapp cd myapp dotnet new gitignore

设置实体框架和 PostgreSQL 库

dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef dotnet add package Npgsql --version 6.0.4 dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design

创建模型

运行迁移

dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate dotnet ef database update

对现有数据库进行逆向工程

如果您有现有的 SQL Server 数据库，并且希望将表迁移到 PostgreSQL 数据库，则可以执行以下步骤。

  1. 为 PostgreSQL 添加一个新的 ConnectionString ...

https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/ef/core/managing-schemas/scaffolding?tabs=dotnet-core-cli https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/ef/core/managing-schemas/scaffolding?tabs=dotnet-core-cli

 dotnet ef dbcontext scaffold "Data Source=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Initial Catalog=Chinook" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer"


原文:

Work in progress...

This guide helps you setup a new .NET 6 project using PostgreSQL as a database.

Scaffold a project 

dotnet new webapi -o myapp
cd myapp
dotnet new gitignore

Setup Entity Framework and PostgreSQL libraries 

dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef
dotnet add package Npgsql --version 6.0.4
dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore
dotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design

Create Models

Run the migrations

dotnet ef migrations add InitialCreate
dotnet ef database update

Reverse Engineering an Existing Database

If you have an existing SQL Server database and you would like to migrate the tables to a PostgreSQL database, you can do the following steps.

  1. Add a new ConnectionString for PostgreSQL ...

https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/ef/core/managing-schemas/scaffolding?tabs=dotnet-core-cli

dotnet ef dbcontext scaffold "Data Source=(localdb)\MSSQLLocalDB;Initial Catalog=Chinook" Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer"
Items.Author: jgngo

Items.Title: 团队合作 | Teamwork
Items.Description:
有些人认为开发是一项独立的工作，每个开发人员都应该自己解决所有问题。 但是，在我看来，这些人错过了开发人员工作的一个重要部分：团队合作。 事实上，当你体验到真正的包容性团队合作时，你学到的是团队合作是由持续的辩论组成的，这导致每天彼此学习很多。

此外，在团队合作中，我们还应该考虑和学习许多其他方面：

首先，成功总是一个很好的成就，这并不容易，但是人际关系在团队内部非常重要，而粗鲁的接触所付出的代价就是破坏这种关系。 此外，也有人说说真话会破坏人际关系，但这并不完全正确。 事实是，这取决于你说真话的方式。 很多时候，我们缺乏的是以清晰和尊重的方式说话和说真话（一种自信）的能力。 相反，当我们说出真相时，我们常常变得紧张，因此显得不尊重。 这是一项重要的技能，应该学习。

其次（但与第一点相关），在团队内部取得成功的能力在于建立强大而深入的联系和关系的能力。 为了达到这样的目标，我们需要沟通。 说话可能是一种很好的交流方式，但它不是唯一的。 为了交流，我们真正需要的是一种真诚的愿望，即为我们想要联系的人、公司、社区或机构的整体健康做出贡献。 为了实现这样的目标，我们需要走一条个人发展道路。

最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们登陆的球队肯定不是完美的，当然他们可能会有很多火焰，但我们应该认为我们并非无能为力。 我们可以为改善团队做出巨大贡献。 我知道，这并不容易，但团队需要的是梦想家和有目标的人，如果你是他们中的一员，即使你可能会遇到很多问题（他们可以通过耐心、谦逊和善良来解决），你会成功. 在其他方面，每一步，即使是最小的一步，也是迈向改进的一步。

但是，我们应该记住，如果球队不适合我们，我们可以离开并寻找另一个更适合我们的球队。 我们应该始终明确我们的目的，并根据团队的目的检查它们，但这并不意味着我们不应该为现在的团队做出贡献。

团队是由人组成的，而人，归根结底是我们应该关心的。



原文:

There are people that think that developing is a standalone job and every developer should figure out everything on their own. But, from my point of view, these people miss an important part of a developer’s job: teamwork. In fact, when you experience real and inclusive teamwork what you learn is that teamwork is made up of continuous debating that leads to learning a lot from each other every day.

Besides, there are many other aspects we should consider and learn when we come to teamwork:

First, succeeding to be kind is always a good achievement and it’s not easy at all, but human relationships are very important inside teams and the price to pay for a rude contact is to ruin such kinds of relationships. Besides, there are people that say that speaking the truth can ruin relationships, but this is not totally correct. The fact is that it depends on the way you say the truth. Many times, what we lack is the ability to speak and truth (a to be assertive) in a clear and respectful way. Instead often when we come to speak the truth we became nervous and so we appear unrespectful. This is an important skill that should be learned.

Second (but related to the first point), the ability to succeed inside a team lies in the ability to build strong and deep connections and relationships. And in order to reach such a goal, we need to communicate. Speaking could be a good means to communicate but it’s not the only one. What we really need in order to communicate (even though it could seem unrelated) is a sincere desire to contribute to the general wellness of the person, company, community, or institution we want to connect with. And in order to achieve such a goal we need to engage in a personal development path.

At last but not least, surely teams where we land are not perfect, surely they could have a lot of flames but we should think we’re not helpless. We can give a great contribution to improving the team. I know, it’s not easy but what a team needs is dreamers and people with purpose, and if you are one of them even though you could encounter a lot of issues (they could be fixed with patience, humility, and kindness) you will succeed. On the rest, every single step, even if the smallest, is however a step towards improvement.

However, we should keep in mind, that if the team doesn’t fit with us, we could leave and find another team that better fits with us. We should have always cleared our purpose and checked them against the team’s purpose but this doesn’t mean we shouldn’t give our contribution to the team we are now.

Teams are made of people, and people are, in the last instance, what we should care about.
Items.Author: willypuzzle

Items.Title: 以简单的方式学习 Java 的最佳方法 | Best way to learn Java in easy way
Items.Description:
迪帕克·古普塔

发表于好吧，这根本不重要，如果您有足够的兴趣，可以直接从 java 开始。 但是，具有基本 OOP 概念的先验知识和一点编程经验（或基本编程概念）将有助于您更好地理解它并使其更容易。 虽然不是强制性的，但要在切换到 java 之前牢牢掌握这些概念，你可以使用 C/C++（建议我从 C++ 开始，它对我更好地理解 java 有很大帮助）
我也是java学习者，但我想回答你的问题。 这里已经给出了所有重要的提示，但我只想再补充一点非常重要。 如果您是初学者，请不要使用任何类型的 IDE。 这对从事非常大的项目开发的人很有帮助。 我建议初学者使用记事本和命令提示符。 使用它时，除了互联网文章之外，您没有什么可以帮助您的。 所以你可以自己纠正你的错误。 通过这种方式，您在学习的同时也获得了体面的经验。 这种学习方法缓慢但非常有效。 虽然你将来必须使用 IDE，但你会有很好的纠正错误的能力。

您可以很好地了解哪种类型的错误会导致哪种类型的错误。

结论

我希望你觉得这篇文章有用，如果你需要任何帮助，请在评论部分告诉我。💯



原文:

Deepak Gupta

Posted on May 27

Well, it doesn’t really matter at all , if you’re interested enough you can directly give it a start with java . However having a prior knowledge of basic OOP’s concepts and a little programming experience(or basic programming concepts) would help you to understand it better and make it easier . Though not mandatory , but to have a strong grip over the concepts before switching to java you can go with C/ C++ ( suggesting as I started with C++ and it has helped me a lot to understand java better)
I am also a java learner but i would like to answer your question. Here all important tips are already given but i want to add only one more point which is much important. If you are a beginner, please don't use any kind of IDE. IDE is specially made for those who already a pretty decent experienced in programming. It is helpful for them who are in a very big project development. I would recommend to use notepad and command prompt as a beginner. As using this you have nothing to help you except the internet articles. So you can rectify your error yourself. In this way you have gain also a decent experience while learning. This learning method is slow but very effective. Although you have to use IDE in your future but you will have a good ability to rectify your mistakes.

You can gain a good idea of what type error comes for what kind of mistakes.

Conclusion

I hope you found this article useful, if you need any help please let me know in the comment section.💯
Items.Author: deepakguptacoder

Items.Title: 初创公司在软件产品开发中面临的 5 大挑战 | Top five challenges that startups face in software product development
Items.Description:
软件创业公司是在创造最大就业机会方面接替制造业和零售业的新时代企业。 小型和大型软件开发公司都在进入这一领域以实现他们的成功愿景。

软件产品的开发绝非易事。 它涉及大量的规划、设计、实施和测试。 项目的成败取决于你在这个周期中计划和管理各种活动的程度。

虽然创业有很多优势，但没有成熟公司的支持可能会给小企业带来重大挑战。 例如，大公司拥有处理复杂 IT 问题的资源和基础设施，但初创公司通常没有。

通常，初创公司面临预算、时间管理和利益相关者之间沟通的问题。 有时，对于在规定的时间范围内实现既定目标，在特定的一天需要做什么并没有清晰的理解。

正确的软件可以帮助初创公司在他们的使命中脱颖而出，但要做到正确并不容易。 在初始阶段需要大量的努力和投资。 因此，初创公司需要为应对新产品开发的共同挑战做好准备。

软件产品开发是一项具有挑战性的任务，可能会出现许多可能会延迟软件产品开发的陷阱和问题。 这就是为什么这不是你应该尝试自己做的事情。 这就是我们的专家团队提供帮助的地方。

多年来，Softweb Solutions 一直在帮助新企业起步和发展，并且了解开发成功软件产品所需的来龙去脉。 我们可以帮助您确保您的产品具有可扩展性并支持您的业务目标。



原文:

Software startup companies are the new age enterprises that have taken over from manufacturing and retailing in terms of creating maximum employment opportunities. Both small and large software development companies are entering into this field to fulfill their vision of success.

The development of a software product is never easy. It involves lots of planning, design, implementation and testing. The success or failure of the project depends on how well you plan and manage various activities in this cycle.

While there are many advantages to being a startup, not having the support of an established company can present significant challenges for small businesses. For example, large companies have the resources and infrastructure in place to deal with complex IT issues, but startups often do not.

Often, startups face issues regarding budget, time management and communication between stakeholders. At times, there isn’t a clear understanding of what needs to be done on a particular day for achieving the set goals within a stipulated time frame.

The right software can help startups excel in their mission, but getting it right is not easy. It requires a great deal of effort and investment in the initial stages. Hence, startup companies need to stay prepared for handling the common challenges of new product development.

Softweb Solutions has been helping new businesses get off the ground and grow for years and knows the ins and outs of what it takes to develop a successful software product. We can help you to make sure that your product is scalable and supports your business goals.

Items.Title: A11Y 101：缺少表单标签 | A11Y 101: Missing form labels
Items.Description:
使用表单时，我们应该始终选择使用表单标签来描述标签。

然而，许多设计师希望在现代应用程序中隐藏这些标签，因为它们会使东西变得笨重。

一些没有标签的表格很好的例子可以是：

  • 足够清晰的订阅表格

我们在这两个示例中看到的共同点是只有一个字段和一个按钮的表单。
通常，表单的用途和对用户的期望是很清楚的。

在我的示例中，我使用占位符来为视觉读者描述它。 但是，对于视障人士来说，这种形式可能还不清楚。

为了使该表单易于访问，我们应该使用不可见的标签来描述该字段。 我们可以使用三个选项。

隐藏标签元素

这是添加标签来描述表单字段的最语义化的方式。

我们将其设置为为表单字段添加常规标签，但使用 CSS 将其隐藏在浏览器中。 屏幕阅读器仍然可以通过这种方式阅读。 

 <label class= "hidden" for= "search" > Search </label> <input type= "text" id= "search" />

为了让屏幕阅读器隐藏元素，我们必须使用特定的 CSS； 我将在下面的文章中写得更详细一些，因为这里又有多种选择。

标题属性

另一种让屏幕阅读器了解输入字段用途的方法是向输入字段添加标题属性。

但是，这带来了向视觉用户显示此标题属性的缺点。

这取决于您的用例是否可以接受。

 <input id= "search" type= "text" title= "Search" />

咏叹调标签属性

最后一种方法是使用aria-label 。 它的工作原理与 title 方法相同，但不会显示给视觉用户。

这是添加描述性文本而不会弄乱隐藏样式的最安全方法。

 <input id= "search" type= "text" aria-label= "Search" />

结论

有三种方法可以使没有标签的表单字段可访问，这三种方法都有自己的用例，由开发人员决定哪一种效果最好。

我喜欢 aria-label 方法，因为它在添加没人会看到的元素时干扰最小，但隐藏标签同样好。
如果您别无选择，我建议您仅使用标题。

注意：您应该只使用这三种方法中的一种，不要将它们结合使用，因为屏幕阅读器会读取您的信息两次。

感谢您的阅读，让我们联系吧！

感谢您阅读我的博客。 随时订阅我的电子邮件通讯并在Facebook或Twitter 上联系



原文:

When working with forms, we should always opt to have form labels describing the label.

However, many designers want to hide these labels in modern-day applications as they make things bulky.

Some good examples of forms without labels can be:

  • A subscribe form that is clear enough

The common thing we see in both examples is a form with only one field and a button.
Often, it can be clear enough as to what the form is for and what is expected of the user.

I use a placeholder to describe it for the visual reader in my example. However, it might be unclear what this form is for visually impaired people.

To make this form accessible, we should use invisible labels to describe the field. There are three options we can use.

Hidden label element

This is the most semantic way of adding the label to describe the form field.

We set it up as we would add a regular label for a form field but use CSS to hide it from the browser. Screen readers will still be able to read it this way.

<label class="hidden" for="search">Search</label>
<input type="text" id="search" />

To make elements hidden for screen readers, we have to use specific CSS; I'll write a bit more in detail in the following article as there are multiple options again.

Title attribute

Another way of making the screen readers aware of what an input field is for is to add a title attribute to the input field.

However, this comes with the drawback of it showing this title attribute to visual users.

It's up to you if that's acceptable for your use case.

<input id="search" type="text" title="Search" />

Aria-label attribute

The last method is to use aria-label. It works the same as the title method but doesn't show up for visual users.

This is the safest way of adding descriptive text without messing with hidden styles.

<input id="search" type="text" aria-label="Search" />

Conclusion

There are three ways of making form fields without labels accessible, all three have their use-cases, and it's up to the developer to decide which one works best.

I like the aria-label approach as it's least intrusive in adding elements nobody will see, but the hidden label is just as good.
I would advise only resort to the title if you have no other choice.

Note: You should only use one of the three methods, don't combine them as screen readers will read your information twice.

Thank you for reading, and let's connect!

Thank you for reading my blog. Feel free to subscribe to my email newsletter and connect on Facebook or Twitter

Items.Title: 如何从您的 Prisma 模式创建 JSON 服务器？ | How to create a JSON server from your Prisma schema?
Items.Description:
名为json-server的库允许您从一个小的 JSON 文件快速运行 REST API 服务器。 当您构建新东西或尝试前端项目时，这非常有用。

你当然可以手工制作这个 JSON 文件。 但是当你的模式随着时间的推移而增长时，它会变得乏味。

那么，我们如何才能自动生成这个 JSON 文件呢？

这是您需要做的：

将生成db.json文件。

你会看到这样的东西：



原文:

The library called json-server allows you to quickly run a REST API server from just a small JSON file. Which can be really useful when your building something new or trying out a frontend project.

You can make this JSON file by hand of course. But it would get tedious when your schema grows with time.

So, how can we automate the generation of this JSON file?

Here's what you need to do:

1- Install the generator 

 npm install prisma-json-server-generator

 yarn add prisma-json-server-generator

2- Add the generator to your Prisma schema

generator json_server {
  provider       = "prisma-json-server-generator"
  outputFileName = "db.json"
}

3- Run npx prisma generate for your schema(or the example below)

model User {
  id    Int     @id @default(autoincrement())
  email String  @unique
  name  String?
  posts Post[]
}

model Post {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
  title     String
  content   String?
  published Boolean  @default(false)
  viewCount Int      @default(0)
  author    User?    @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
  authorId  Int?
}

Will generate the db.json file.

4- Install json-server

npm install -g json-server

5- Now run your server!

You will see something like this:

Items.Title: 如何在 Python 中打印列表？ | How to print a list in Python?
Items.Description:
所有这些数据结构本质上都是可变的和顺序的，并以各种格式存储大量数据集合。 在本教程中，我们将讨论在 Python 中打印列表的各种方法。

目录

列表可以包含任意数量的不同数据类型的元素，例如整数、浮点数、字符串等。在 Python 中，打印列表是一项可以使用各种方法执行的简单任务。 本教程介绍了在 Python 中打印列表的一些方法。

在 Python 中使用 * 符号打印列表

要在带有空格的单行中打印列表的内容，* 或 splat 运算符是一种方法。 它将列表的所有内容传递给函数。

我们可以在新行中打印所有元素或用空格分隔，为此，我们分别使用 sep=”\n” 或 sep=”, ”。 下面的示例说明了这一点。

输入：

 list = [Jon, Ned, 8, 99] print (*list) print ("printing lists separated by commas") print (*list, sep=",") print ("printing lists in new line") print (*list, sep="\n")

输出：

 Jon Ned 8 99 printing lists separated by commas Jon, Ned, 8, 99 printing lists in new line Jon Ned 8 99

在 Python 中使用 join() 打印列表

如果列表包含字符串作为元素，那么使用 join() 函数是明智的选择。 它只是连接字符串，然后打印列表。 如果列表中有整数，则此函数将首先将它们连接到一个字符串，然后打印该字符串。 这个例子展示了它是如何完成的：

输入：

 list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"] print (' '.join(list)) list_1 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] print str(list_1)[1:-1]

输出：

 John Ned Arya 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

在 Python 中使用 map() 函数打印列表

在将给定函数应用于给定可迭代对象的每个项目后，它会返回一个映射对象（它是一个迭代器）。 然后 join() 函数使用前面方法中提到的分隔符连接列表的元素。 这是如何完成的：

输入：

 list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] print(' '.join(map(str, list)))

输出：

在 Python 中，使用 for 循环打印列表

在 Python 中打印列表的标准方法之一是使用 for 循环。 您可以从第 0 个索引遍历列表到 len(list) 并打印序列中的所有元素。

输入：

 list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"] for i in range(0, len(list)): print(list[i])

输出：

此外，您还可以使用 for 循环打印列表，而无需提及范围，如下所示：

输入：

 list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"] for item in list: print(item)

输出：



 结束的想法

打印列表是编写程序并获得预期输出时的日常任务之一。 因此，我们讨论了 Python 中打印列表的不同方法。 可以在此处了解与 Python 列表相关的其他任务。



原文:

Python has many in-built data structures to make programming faster and more efficient than any other language. All these data structures are mutable and sequential in nature and store huge data collection in various formats. Python’s list data structure is built for simplicity and flexibility. In this tutorial, we will discuss various ways to print a list in Python.

Table of contents

Introduction to Python print list

A list can contain any number of elements of different data types such as integer, float, string, etc. and in Python, printing a list is a simple task that can be executed using various methods. This tutorial covers some of the methods to print lists in Python.

Using the * symbol to print a list in Python

To print the contents of a list in a single line with space, * or splat operator is one way to go. It passes all of the contents of a list to a function.

We can print all elements in new lines or separated by space and to do that, we use sep=”\n” or sep=”, ” respectively. The below example illustrates this.

Input: 

list = [Jon, Ned, 8, 99]
print (*list)

print ("printing lists separated by commas")
print (*list, sep=",")

print ("printing lists in new line")
print (*list, sep="\n")

Output: 

Jon Ned 8 99
printing lists separated by commas
Jon, Ned, 8, 99
printing lists in new line
Jon
Ned
8
99

Using join() to print a list in Python

If the list contains strings as elements, then using the join() function is the smart choice. It simply joins the strings and then prints the list. If the list has integers, then this function will join them to a string first and then print the string. This example shows how it's done:

Input: 

list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"]
print (' '.join(list))

list_1 = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print str(list_1)[1:-1]

Output: 

John Ned Arya
1, 2, 3, 4, 5

Using map() function to print list in Python

The map() function takes two arguments: a function to apply to each element of a list, and a list. It returns a map object (which is an iterator) after applying the given function to each item of a given iterable. Then the join() function joins the elements of the list using a separator as mentioned in the earlier method. Here's how it's done:

Input: 

list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print(' '.join(map(str, list)))

Output:

In Python, print list using for loop

One of the standard methods to print a list in Python is using the for loop. You can traverse the list from the 0th index to len(list) and print all the elements in the sequence.

Input: 

list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"]

for i in range(0, len(list)):
     print(list[i])

Output:

Moreover, you can also print the list using for loop without mentioning the range as shown below:

Input: 

list = ["Jon", "Ned", "Arya"]

for item in list:
     print(item)

Output:



Closing thoughts

Printing the list is one of the everyday tasks while coding your program and getting the expected output. Therefore, we discussed different ways in Python to print the list. One can learn about other tasks related to the Python list here.

Items.Title: iOS中如何使用ZEGOCLOUD SDK实现变声/混响/虚拟立体声 | How to use ZEGOCLOUD SDK to implement Voice change/Reverb/Virtual stereo in iOS
Items.Description:
介绍

在直播、聊天室、卡拉OK等场景中，为了增加趣味性和互动性，玩家可以通过变声来搞笑，回响气氛，利用立体声让声音更有立体感。 开发者可以灵活设置自己想要的声音。 如果需要收听，可以开启回耳功能进行测试。

  • 变声：通过改变用户的音高，输出的声音在感官上与原声不同，实现男声变女声等多种效果。
  • 混响：通过对声音的特殊处理，创造出不同环境的混响效果，使声音仿佛置身于音乐厅、大教堂等。
  • 混响回声：通过对声音的特殊处理，可以搭配变声和混响，实现空灵、机器人声音等多种自定义音效。
  • 虚拟立体声：通过双声道技术的深度运用，虚拟化声源的每个位置和角度，实现立体声、3D环绕声、声音辨别。

该功能仅对 SDK 采集的声音有效。 开发者可以在通话或直播过程中动态调整语音变化、混响、混响回声和虚拟立体声。

先决条件

在进行语音更改/混响/立体声之前，请确保：

语音变化

设置预设语音转换器

调用setVoiceChangerPreset方法使用 SDK 预设变声器效果。

以下示例代码以男声转童声为例：

 [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setVoiceChangerPreset : ZegoVoiceChangerPresetMenToChild ];

设置自定义语音转换器

如果SDK预设的变声效果不能满足需求，开发者可以调用ZegoVoiceChangerParam方法通过音高参数“pitch”设置自定义变声，该参数的取值范围为[-8.0, 8.0]，越大越好该值，声音越尖锐，默认值为“0.0”（即不改变声音）。

 ZegoVoiceChangerParam * param = [[ ZegoVoiceChangerParam alloc ] init ]; param . pitch = 2 . 0 ; [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setVoiceChangerParam : param ];

混响

设置预设混响

调用setReverbPreset通过预设枚举设置混响。

以下示例代码以大房间模式为例：

 [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setReverbPreset : ZegoReverbPresetLargeRoom ];

设置自定义混响

如果SDK预设的混响类型不能满足要求，开发者可以调用ZegoReverbAdvancedParam方法，匹配相关参数设置，达到开发者需要的混响效果（详细参数说明请参考API文档）。

 ZegoReverbAdvancedParam * reverbParam = [[ ZegoReverbAdvancedParam alloc ] init ]; reverbParam . damping = 50 . 0 ; // Reverberation damping reverbParam . reverberance = 50 . 0 ; // Reverberation reverbParam . roomSize = 50 . 0 ; // room size reverbParam . wetOnly = false ; reverbParam . wetGain = 5 . 0 ; reverbParam . dryGain = 5 . 0 ; reverbParam . toneLow = 80 . 0 ; reverbParam . toneHigh = 80 . 0 ; reverbParam . preDelay = 20 . 0 ; reverbParam . stereoWidth = 0 . 0 ; [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setReverbAdvancedParam : reverbParam ];

设置自定义混响参数后，开启混响时设置的预置混响效果将失效。 如果要再次使用 SDK 预设参数，可以使用setReverbPreset方法进行设置。

混响回声

调用setReverbEchoParam方法，通过配置相关参数回声效果实现开发者需要的混响效果（详细参数说明请参考API文档）。

以下示例代码以空灵效果为例：

 ZegoReverbEchoParam * echoParamEthereal = [[ ZegoReverbEchoParam alloc ] init ]; echoParamEthereal . inGain = 0 . 8 ; echoParamEthereal . outGain = 1 . 0 ; echoParamEthereal . numDelays = 7 ; echoParamEthereal . delay = @[ @230 , @460 , @690 , @920 , @1150 , @1380 , @1610 ]; echoParamEthereal . decay = @[ @0.41f , @0.18f , @0.08f , @0.03f , @0.009f , @0.003f , @0.001f ]; [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setReverbEchoParam : echoParamEthereal ];

虚拟立体声

设置流音频通道数

如果需要开启虚拟立体声功能，推流前必须先调用setAudioConfig方法设置音频编码通道为Stereo双通道（默认为Mono）。

这里的示例使用预设的枚举结构ZegoAudioConfig设置为双通道。

 ZegoAudioConfig * config = [ ZegoAudioConfig configWithPreset : ZegoAudioConfigPresetStandardQualityStereo ]; [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] setAudioConfig : config ];

设置虚拟立体声参数

将音频编码通道设置为双通道后，调用enableVirtualStereo方法，通过enable参数开启虚拟立体声，通过angle参数设置虚拟立体声的声源角度，即可产生立体声效果。 角度范围为 0 到 360，一般可以设置为 90 度（即正前方）。

要启用它，请将angle参数设置为-1 。

下面展示了如何打开虚拟立体声并将角度设置为 90 度：

 [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] enableVirtualStereo : YES angle : 90 ];

下面展示了如何启用全能虚拟立体声：

 [[ ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine ] enableVirtualStereo : YES angle : - 1 ];


原文:

Introduction

In the live broadcast, chat room, and karaoke room scenes, in order to increase the fun and interactivity, players can change the voice to make things funny, reverberate the atmosphere, and use stereo to make the sound more three-dimensional. ZegoExpress SDK provides a variety of preset voice change, reverberation, reverberation echo, and stereo effects. Developers can flexibly set the sound they want. If you need to listen to it, you can enable ear return for testing.

  • Voice change: By changing the user's pitch, the output sound is sensory different from the original sound, and various effects such as changing male voice to female voice are realized.
  • Reverberation: Through special processing of the sound, the reverberation effect of different environments is created, making the sound appear as if it is in a concert hall, a cathedral, etc.
  • Reverberation echo: Through special processing of the sound, it can be matched with voice change and reverberation to achieve a variety of custom sound effects, such as ethereal and robot sounds.
  • Virtual stereo: Through the deep use of dual-channel technology, each position and angle of the sound source is virtualized to achieve stereo sound, 3D surround sound, and sound discrimination.

The function is only effective for the sound collected by the SDK. The developer can dynamically adjust the voice change, reverberation, reverberation echo, and virtual stereo during a call or live broadcast.

Prerequisites

Before proceeding with voice change/reverb/stereo, please make sure:

Voice Change

Set Preset Voice Changer

Call setVoiceChangerPreset method to use SDK preset voice changer effect.

ZegoVoiceChangerPreset preset voice changing effects are as follows, developers can choose according to their needs:

The following sample code takes a male voice to a child voice as an example:

[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setVoiceChangerPreset:ZegoVoiceChangerPresetMenToChild];

Set Custom Voice Changer

If the sound changing effect preset by the SDK cannot meet the demand, the developer can call the ZegoVoiceChangerParam method to pass the pitch parameter "pitch" sets custom voice change, the value range of this parameter is [-8.0, 8.0], the larger the value, the sharper the sound, the default value is "0.0" (that is, no voice change).

ZegoVoiceChangerParam *param = [[ZegoVoiceChangerParam alloc] init];
param.pitch = 2.0;
[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setVoiceChangerParam:param];

Reverberation

Set Preset Reverb

Call setReverbPreset to set reverberation through preset enumeration.

ZegoReverbPreset preset reverb effects are as follows, developers can choose according to their needs:

The following sample code takes the large room mode as an example:

[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setReverbPreset:ZegoReverbPresetLargeRoom];

Set Custom Reverb

If the SDK preset reverb type cannot meet the requirements, the developer can call the ZegoReverbAdvancedParam method, and match the relevant parameters Settings to achieve the reverberation effect required by the developer (for detailed parameter descriptions, please refer to the API documentation).

ZegoReverbAdvancedParam *reverbParam = [[ZegoReverbAdvancedParam alloc] init];
reverbParam.damping = 50.0; // Reverberation damping
reverbParam.reverberance = 50.0; // Reverberation
reverbParam.roomSize = 50.0; // room size
reverbParam.wetOnly = false;
reverbParam.wetGain = 5.0;
reverbParam.dryGain = 5.0;
reverbParam.toneLow = 80.0;
reverbParam.toneHigh = 80.0;
reverbParam.preDelay = 20.0;
reverbParam.stereoWidth = 0.0; [[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setReverbAdvancedParam:reverbParam];

After setting the custom reverb parameters, the preset reverb effect set when reverb is enabled will be invalid. If you want to use the SDK preset parameters again, you can use setReverbPreset method to set.

Reverberation Echo

Call the setReverbEchoParam method to achieve the reverberation required by the developer through the configuration of related parameters Echo effect (please refer to API documentation for detailed parameter description).

The following sample code takes the ethereal effect as an example:

ZegoReverbEchoParam *echoParamEthereal = [[ZegoReverbEchoParam alloc] init];
echoParamEthereal.inGain = 0.8;
echoParamEthereal.outGain = 1.0;
echoParamEthereal.numDelays = 7;
echoParamEthereal.delay = @[@230, @460, @690, @920, @1150, @1380, @1610];
echoParamEthereal.decay = @[@0.41f, @0.18f, @0.08f, @0.03f, @0.009f, @0.003f, @0.001f];
[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setReverbEchoParam:echoParamEthereal];

Virtual Stereo

Set the Number of Streaming Audio Channels

If you need to turn on the virtual stereo function, you must first call the setAudioConfig method to set before pushing the stream The audio encoding channel is Stereo dual channel (default is Mono).

The example here uses the preset enumeration structure ZegoAudioConfig to be set to dual-channel.

ZegoAudioConfig *config = [ZegoAudioConfig configWithPreset:ZegoAudioConfigPresetStandardQualityStereo]; [[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] setAudioConfig:config];

Set Virtual Stereo Parameters

After setting the audio encoding channel to dual channel, call the enableVirtualStereo method, turn on the virtual stereo through the enable parameter, and set the sound source angle of the virtual stereo through the angle parameter to have the stereo effect. The angle range is 0 to 360, and generally can be set to 90 degrees (that is, straight ahead).

Starting from the 2.15.0 version, the SDK supports the all-around virtual stereo. To enable it, set the angle parameter to -1.

The following shows how to turn on the virtual stereo and set the angle to 90 degrees:

[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] enableVirtualStereo:YES angle:90];

The following shows how to enable the all-around virtual stereo:

[[ZegoExpressEngine sharedEngine] enableVirtualStereo:YES angle:-1];
Items.Author: lanceodev

Items.Title: 如何使用ZEGOCLOUD SDK在Android中实现变声/混响/虚拟立体声 | How to use ZEGOCLOUD SDK to implement Voice change/Reverb/Virtual stereo in Android
Items.Description:
介绍

在直播、聊天室、卡拉OK等场景中，为了增加趣味性和互动性，玩家可以通过变声来搞笑，回响气氛，利用立体声让声音更有立体感。 开发者可以灵活设置自己想要的声音。 如果需要收听，可以开启回耳功能进行测试。

  • 变声：通过改变用户的音高，输出的声音在感官上与原声不同，实现男声变女声等多种效果。
  • 混响：通过对声音的特殊处理，创造出不同环境的混响效果，使声音仿佛置身于音乐厅、大教堂等。
  • 混响回声：通过对声音的特殊处理，可以搭配变声和混响，实现空灵、机器人声音等多种自定义音效。
  • 虚拟立体声：通过双声道技术的深度运用，虚拟化声源的每个位置和角度，实现立体声、3D环绕声、声音辨别。

该功能仅对 SDK 采集的声音有效。 开发者可以在通话或直播过程中动态调整语音变化、混响、混响回声和虚拟立体声。

先决条件

在进行语音更改/混响/立体声之前，请确保：

语音变化

设置预设语音转换器

调用setVoiceChangerPreset方法使用 SDK 预设变声器效果。

以下示例代码以男声转童声为例：

 ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setVoiceChangerPreset ( ZegoVoiceChangerPreset . MEN_TO_CHILD );

设置自定义语音转换器

如果SDK预设的变声效果不能满足需要，开发者可以调用ZegoVoiceChangerParam方法，通过pitch参数pitch设置自定义变声器，该参数的取值范围为[-8.0, 8.0]，越大值，声音越尖锐，默认值为0.0（即没有声音变化）。

 ZegoVoiceChangerParam voiceChangerParam = new ZegoVoiceChangerParam (); param . pitch = 2.0f ; ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setVoiceChangerParam ( param );

混响

设置预设混响

调用setReverbPreset通过预设枚举设置混响。

以下示例代码以大房间模式为例：

 ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setReverbPreset ( ZegoReverbPreset . LARGE_ROOM );

设置自定义混响

如果 SDK 预设的混响类型不能满足需求，开发者可以调用ZegoReverbAdvancedParam方法，通过相关参数的配置实现开发者需要的混响效果（详细参数说明请参考 API 文档）。

 ZegoReverbAdvancedParam reverbParam = new ZegoReverbAdvancedParam (); reverbParam . damping = 50.0 ; // Reverberation damping reverbParam . reverberance = 50.0 ; // Reverberation reverbParam . roomSize = 50.0 ; // room size reverbParam . wetOnly = false ; reverbParam . wetGain = 5.0 ; reverbParam . dryGain = 5.0 ; reverbParam . toneLow = 80.0 ; reverbParam . toneHigh = 80.0 ; reverbParam . preDelay = 20.0 ; reverbParam . stereoWidth = 0.0 ; ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setReverbAdvancedParam ( reverbParam );

设置自定义混响参数后，开启混响时设置的预置混响效果将失效。 如果要再次使用 SDK 预设参数，可以使用setReverbPreset 。 设置枚举方法来设置。

混响回声

调用setReverbEchoParam方法并设置相关参数，实现开发者所需的混响回声效果（详细参数说明请参考API文档）。

以下示例代码以空灵效果为例：

 ZegoReverbEchoParam echoParam = new ZegoReverbEchoParam (); echoParam . inGain = 0.8f ; echoParam . outGain = 1.0f ; echoParam . numDelays = 7 ; int [] delay ={ 230 , 460 , 690 , 920 , 1150 , 1380 , 1610 }; echoParam . delay = delay ; float [] decay ={ 0.41f , 0.18f , 0.08f , 0.03f , 0.009f , 0.003f , 0.001f }; echoParam . decay = decay ; zegoReverbEchoParamDatas . add ( echoParam ); ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setReverbEchoParam ( echoParam );

虚拟立体声

设置流音频通道数

如果需要开启虚拟立体声功能，推流前必须先调用setAudioConfig方法设置音频编码通道为Stereo双通道（默认为Mono）。

这里的示例使用预设的枚举结构ZegoAudioConfig设置为双通道。

 ZegoAudioConfig audioConfig = new ZegoAudioConfig ( STANDARD_QUALITY_STEREO ); ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). setAudioConfig ( audioConfig );

设置虚拟立体声参数

将音频编码通道设置为双通道后，调用enableVirtualStereo方法，通过enable参数开启虚拟立体声，通过angle参数设置虚拟立体声的声源角度，具有立体声效果。 角度范围为 0 到 360，一般可以设置为 90 度（即正前方）。

要启用它，请将angle参数设置为-1 。

下面展示了如何打开虚拟立体声并将角度设置为 90 度：

 ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). enableVirtualStereo ( true , 90 );

下面展示了如何启用全能虚拟立体声：

 ZegoExpressEngine . getEngine (). enableVirtualStereo ( true , - 1 );


原文:

Introduction

In the live broadcast, chat room, and karaoke room scenes, in order to increase the fun and interactivity, players can change the voice to make things funny, reverberate the atmosphere, and use stereo to make the sound more three-dimensional. ZegoExpress SDK provides a variety of preset voice change, reverberation, reverberation echo, and stereo effects. Developers can flexibly set the sound they want. If you need to listen to it, you can enable ear return for testing.

  • Voice change: By changing the user's pitch, the output sound is sensory different from the original sound, and various effects such as changing male voice to female voice are realized.
  • Reverberation: Through special processing of the sound, the reverberation effect of different environments is created, making the sound appear as if it is in a concert hall, a cathedral, etc.
  • Reverberation echo: Through special processing of the sound, it can be matched with voice change and reverberation to achieve a variety of custom sound effects, such as ethereal and robot sounds.
  • Virtual stereo: Through the deep use of dual-channel technology, each position and angle of the sound source is virtualized to achieve stereo sound, 3D surround sound, and sound discrimination.

The function is only effective for the sound collected by the SDK. Developers can dynamically adjust the voice change, reverberation, reverberation echo, and virtual stereo during a call or live broadcast.

Prerequisites

Before proceeding with voice change/reverb/stereo, please make sure:

Voice Change

Set Preset Voice Changer

Call the setVoiceChangerPreset method to use SDK preset voice changer effect.

ZegoVoiceChangerPreset preset voice changing effects are as follows, developers can choose according to their needs:

The following sample code takes a male voice to a child voice as an example:

ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setVoiceChangerPreset(ZegoVoiceChangerPreset.MEN_TO_CHILD);

Set Custom Voice Changer

If the sound changing effect preset by the SDK cannot meet the needs, the developer can call ZegoVoiceChangerParam Method, through the pitch parameter pitch to set a custom voice changer, the value range of this parameter is [-8.0, 8.0], the larger the value, the sharper the sound, the default value is 0.0 (ie no voice change).

ZegoVoiceChangerParam voiceChangerParam = new ZegoVoiceChangerParam();
param.pitch = 2.0f;
ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setVoiceChangerParam(param);

Reverberation

Set Preset Reverb

Call setReverbPreset to set reverberation through preset enumeration.

ZegoReverbPreset preset reverb effects are as follows, developers can choose according to their needs:

The following sample code takes the large room mode as an example:

ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setReverbPreset(ZegoReverbPreset.LARGE_ROOM);

Set Custom Reverb

If the SDK preset reverb type cannot meet the needs, developers can call ZegoReverbAdvancedParam method, to achieve the reverberation effect required by the developer through the configuration of related parameters (for detailed parameter description, please refer to the API documentation).

ZegoReverbAdvancedParam reverbParam = new ZegoReverbAdvancedParam();
reverbParam.damping = 50.0; // Reverberation damping
reverbParam.reverberance = 50.0; // Reverberation
reverbParam.roomSize = 50.0; // room size
reverbParam.wetOnly = false;
reverbParam.wetGain = 5.0;
reverbParam.dryGain = 5.0;
reverbParam.toneLow = 80.0;
reverbParam.toneHigh = 80.0;
reverbParam.preDelay = 20.0;
reverbParam.stereoWidth = 0.0;
ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setReverbAdvancedParam(reverbParam);

After setting the custom reverb parameters, the preset reverb effect set when reverb is enabled will be invalid. If you want to use the SDK preset parameters again, you can use setReverbPreset. Set enumeration method to set.

Reverberation Echo

Call the setReverbEchoParam method and set the relevant parameters to realize the developer The required reverberation echo effect (for detailed parameter description, please refer to the API document).

The following sample code takes the ethereal effect as an example:

ZegoReverbEchoParam echoParam = new ZegoReverbEchoParam();
echoParam.inGain = 0.8f;
echoParam.outGain =1.0f;
echoParam.numDelays = 7;
int[] delay ={230,460,690,920,1150,1380,1610};
echoParam.delay=delay; float[] decay={0.41f,0.18f,0.08f,0.03f,0.009f,0.003f,0.001f};
echoParam.decay=decay;
zegoReverbEchoParamDatas.add(echoParam);
ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setReverbEchoParam(echoParam);

Virtual Stereo

Set the Number of Streaming Audio Channels

If you need to turn on the virtual stereo function, you must first call the setAudioConfig method to set before pushing the stream The audio encoding channel is Stereo dual channel (default is Mono).

The example here uses the preset enumeration structure ZegoAudioConfig to be set to dual-channel.

ZegoAudioConfig audioConfig = new ZegoAudioConfig(STANDARD_QUALITY_STEREO);
ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().setAudioConfig(audioConfig);

Set Virtual Stereo Parameters

After setting the audio encoding channel to dual channel, call the enableVirtualStereo method, Turn on the virtual stereo through the enable parameter, and set the sound source angle of the virtual stereo through the angle parameter to have the stereo effect. The angle range is 0 to 360, and generally can be set to 90 degrees (that is, straight ahead).

Starting from the 2.15.0 version, the SDK supports the all-around virtual stereo. To enable it, set the angle parameter to -1.

The following shows how to turn on the virtual stereo and set the angle to 90 degrees:

ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().enableVirtualStereo(true, 90);

The following shows how to enable the all-around virtual stereo:

ZegoExpressEngine.getEngine().enableVirtualStereo(true, -1);
Items.Author: andrewddev

Items.Title: Como subir tu proyecto de React a GitHub Pages | Como subir tu proyecto de React a GitHub Pages
Items.Description:
准备工作

安装 gh-pages

配置 package.json

提交 y push

结果

注意：En ocasiones es necesario esperar unos minutos para que se actualicen los servidores de GitHub Pages y se muestre nuestro proyecto



原文:

En esta ocasión de mostrare como hacer deploy de tu proyecto de react al servidor de paginas estáticas de github pages. Si sabes que es react seguramente sabrás que GitHub y tendrás tu cuenta, si es así sígueme en github. Por otro lado Github Pages es un servicio adicional de hosting de paginas estáticas (solo HTML, JavaScript y CSS) que NO FUNCIONA COMO SERVIDOR BACKEND, es un servicio gratuito y sencillo de usar.

Preparación

Antes de iniciar el proceso de deploy en GitHub Pages debes tener lo siguiente:

  • [x] Cuenta de GitHub
  • [x] Git instalado en tu computadora
  • [x] Proyecto web en su repositorio en GitHub

Instalación de gh-pages

El primer paso será instalar el paquete gh-pages que nos ayudara a convertir el código de react a archivos estáticos que nos acepte el hosting 

npm install --save-dev gh-pages

recuerda que las banderas "--save-dev" asignan la instalación como dependencias de desarrollo. Una vez que se haya instalado verifica en el archivo package.json que se haya agregado el paquete

},
...
"devDependencies": {
    "gh-pages": "^4.0.0"
    }
...
   }

Configuración package.json

Para configurar nuestro archivo package.json debemos agregar las siguientes reglas, la primera será homepage la vamos agregar después de "devDependencies"

 },
...
"devDependencies": {
    "gh-pages": "^4.0.0"
    },
 "homepage": "https://USUARIO_GITHUB.github.io/NOMBRE_DE_REPOSITORIO"
...
   }

Para esta regla de "homepage" es importante que coloques TU usuario de github y el nombre del repositorio que estas utilizando, por ejemplo

"homepage": "https://aramxD.github.io/react-fetch-exercise"

Ahora vamos a agregar un par de scripts, llamados "predeploy" y "deploy" que nos ayudara a preparar nuestra aplicación para subirla a los servidores de GitHub

},
"scripts": {
    "start": "react-scripts start",
    "build": "react-scripts build",
    "test": "react-scripts test",
    "eject": "react-scripts eject",
    ...
    "predeploy":"npm run build",
    "deploy": "gh-pages -d build
    ...
},

No olvides guardar los cambios

Ejecutamos Deploy

Con los scripts preparados ejecutamos en nuestra terminar el script "deploy"

No olvides que la terminal debe esta en la carpeta de nuestro proyecto.
Una vez que termine la ejecución de nuestro comando, podrás ver que se creo una carpeta llamada "build"

En esta carpeta encontraras lo archivos estáticos de nuestro proyecto

Commit y push

Para finalizar debemos guardar los cambios y agregarlos a nuestro repositorio, primero agregamos los cambios con:

lo siguiente será crear el commit con los cambios

git commit -m"deploy ready"

para finalizar enviamos los cambios al repositorio con "push"



 Resultados

Para comprobar que todo haya salido bien, entra a tu repositorio y dirígete a settings, en el lado izquierdo encontraras el apartado de Pages ahí encontraras el link publico de tu proyecto.

Nota: En ocasiones es necesario esperar unos minutos para que se actualicen los servidores de GitHub Pages y se muestre nuestro proyecto

Items.Title: Android中如何使用ZEGOCLOUD SDK实现通话质量监控 | How to use ZEGOCLOUD SDK to implement call quality monitoring in Android
Items.Description:
介绍

流媒体发布或播放开始后，SDK每3秒触发一次相应的流媒体质量回调，客户端应用通过监听这些回调可以获取实时的流媒体质量数据。

先决条件

在监控流式传输信息之前，请确保完成以下操作：

监控流发布的质量

要监控流发布的质量，请监听onPublisherQualityUpdate回调。 推流发布后，每3秒触发一次该回调，提供推流质量数据。

您可以通过该回调获取流发布质量数据，实时监控流发布的健康状况，并在您的应用UI上展示上行网络质量。

 engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherQualityUpdate ( String streamID , ZegoPublishStreamQuality quality ) { // You can focus on specific quality attributes and report them to your business server, or focus on a specific field of an object for giving friendly notes for users. // The parameter 'quality' has many attributes. If you do not want to handle every one of them, you can just focus on the 'level' attribute, a comprehensive quality indicator calculated by the SDK based on other quality attributes. Log . v ( "onPublisherQualityUpdate: streamID=" , streamID ); } }

流发布质量属性详解

流发布质量包括流发布过程的采集和编码阶段的音视频采集帧率、码率、RTT、丢包率等。

您可以在本节中找到详细的属性定义：

音视频采集质量属性

以下属性反映了音视频采集的流发布质量，接近用户对本地预览的主观感知。

  • 视频编码的质量属性

    编码阶段视频编码的流发布质量属性如下：

    • 流传输的质量属性

      下面的流发布质量属性反映流传输（发送）的质量，与编码码率和当前网络质量有关。

      • 总字节数的质量属性

        下面的流发布质量属性反映了发送的总字节数。

        • 编码信息的质量属性

          下面的流发布质量属性反映了编码信息：

          • 发布流质量等级的质量属性

            参数quality有很多属性。 如果不想一一处理，可以只关注level属性， ZegoExpressEngine根据其他质量属性计算出的综合上行网络质量指标。

            下表描述了level字段：

            监控流播放的质量

            要监控流播放的质量，请监听onPlayerQualityUpdate回调。 开始播放后，每3秒触发一次该回调，提供播放质量数据。

             engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerQualityUpdate ( String streamID , ZegoPlayStreamQuality quality ) { // You can focus on specific quality attributes and report them to your business server, or focus on a specific field of an object for giving friendly notes for users. // The parameter 'quality' has many attributes. If you do not want to handle every one of them, you can just focus on the 'level' attribute, a comprehensive quality indicator calculated by the SDK based on other quality attributes. Log . v ( "onPlayerQualityUpdate: streamID=" , streamID ); } }

            流播放质量属性详解

            流播放质量包括流播放过程的接收、解码和渲染阶段的音视频帧率、码率、延迟、丢包率等。

            您可以在本节中找到详细的属性定义：

            流接收质量属性

            下面的流播放质量属性反映了流接收的质量，与流传输（发送）的质量和当前的网络质量有关。

            • 该值小于0表示视频领先于音频的毫秒数，大于0表示视频落后于音频的毫秒数，0表示无差异。 当绝对值小于200时，基本可以认为是同步音视频，当绝对值连续10秒大于200时，可以认为是异常。
            • 流渲染的质量属性

              下面的流播放属性反映了流渲染阶段的流质量，接近观众的主观感知。 受音视频编解码影响，数值可能低于实际音视频接收帧率。

              • 总字节数的质量属性

                下面的流发布质量属性反映了接收到的字节总数。

                • 解码信息的质量属性

                  下面的流播放质量属性反映了解码信息：

                  • 监控流发布/播放状态

                    回调流发布状态更新

                    流发布开始后，如果状态发生变化，SDK 会通过onPublisherStateUpdate回调发出事件通知。 要监控流发布的状态，请监听此回调。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherStateUpdate ( String streamID , ZegoPublisherState state , int errorCode , JSONObject extendedData ) { super . onPublisherStateUpdate ( streamID , state , errorCode , extendedData ); // In this callback, when the [state] is [ZegoPublisherState.NO_PUBLISH] and the [errorCode] is not 0, indicates the stream publishing is failed. And the SDK won't retry to publish the stream. At this time, user can set a corresponding UI to indicate the current state. // In this callback, when the [state] is [ZegoPublisherState.PUBLISH_REQUESTING] and the [errorCode] is not 0, indicates the stream publishing retry is ongoing. But if the stream publishing retry still fails after the default reconnection duration, it won't try again and will send out a failure notification. } }

                    您可以根据state属性确定用户在发布流时的网络状态。

                    下表描述了state属性的值和对应的用户状态：

                    参数extendedData提供状态更新的扩展信息。 如果你使用的是ZEGO CDN，这个参数的key是flv_url_list 、 rtmp_url_list和hls_url_list ，分别对应FLV 、 RTMP 、 HLS协议的流播放URL。

                    回调流播放状态更新

                    流媒体播放开始后，如果状态发生变化，SDK 会通过onPlayerStateUpdate回调发出事件通知。 要监控流播放的状态，请监听此回调。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerStateUpdate ( String streamID , ZegoPlayerState state , int errorCode , JSONObject extendedData ) { super . onPlayerStateUpdate ( streamID , state , errorCode , extendedData ); // In this callback, when the [state] is [ZegoPlayerState.NO_PLAY] and the [errorCode] is not 0, indicates the stream playing is failed. And the SDK won't retry to play the stream. At this time, user can set a corresponding UI to indicate the current state. // In this callback, when the [state] is [ZegoPlayerState.PLAY_REQUESTING] and the [errorCode] is not 0, indicates the stream playing retry is ongoing. But if the stream playing retry still fails after the default reconnection duration, it won't try again and will send out a failure notification. } }

                    您可以根据state属性判断用户在播放流媒体时的网络状态。

                    下表描述了state属性的值和对应的用户状态：

                    监控第一帧音视频

                    捕获第一帧音频的回调

                    要在捕获第一帧音频时接收事件通知，请侦听onPublisherCapturedAudioFirstFrame回调。

                    流发布开始后，当第一帧音频被捕获时，SDK 通过该回调发出事件通知。

                    首次开启流发布或本地预览时，SDK引擎开始采集本地设备的音频数据，SDK通过该回调发出事件通知。
                    您可以根据返回的事件通知来判断音频数据是否已成功捕获。 如果没有收到通知，则说明正在使用音频设备或设备异常。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherCapturedAudioFirstFrame () { super . onPublisherCapturedAudioFirstFrame (); } }

                    捕获第一帧视频的回调

                    要在捕获第一帧视频时接收事件通知，请侦听onPublisherCapturedVideoFirstFrame回调。

                    流发布开始后，当第一帧视频被抓到时，SDK 通过该回调发出事件通知。

                    首次开启流发布或本地预览时，SDK引擎开始采集本地设备的视频数据，SDK通过该回调发出事件通知。
                    您可以根据返回的事件通知来判断视频数据是否已成功捕获。 如果没有收到通知，则说明视频设备正在使用或设备异常。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherCapturedVideoFirstFrame ( ZegoPublishChannel channel ) { super . onPublisherCapturedVideoFirstFrame ( channel ); } }

                    接收到第一帧音频的回调

                    要在接收到第一帧音频时接收事件通知，请监听onPlayerRecvAudioFirstFrame回调。

                    流式播放开始后，SDK 会在收到第一帧音频时通过该回调发出事件通知。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerRecvAudioFirstFrame ( String streamID ) { super . onPlayerRecvAudioFirstFrame ( streamID ); AppLogger . getInstance (). receiveCallback ( "onPlayerRecvAudioFirstFrame streamID:%s" , streamID ); } }

                    接收到第一帧视频的回调

                    要在接收到第一帧视频时接收事件通知，请监听onPlayerRecvVideoFirstFrame回调。

                    流播放开始后，SDK 在收到第一帧视频时通过该回调发出事件通知。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerRecvVideoFirstFrame ( String streamID ) { super . onPlayerRecvVideoFirstFrame ( streamID ); } }

                    渲染第一帧视频的回调

                    要在渲染第一帧视频时接收事件通知，请侦听onPlayerRenderVideoFirstFrame回调。

                    流式播放开始后，SDK 会在接收到第一帧视频并渲染完毕后通过该回调发出事件通知。

                    您还可以使用该回调来计算捕获/接收/渲染第一帧所消耗的时间，或者使用该回调来更新流播放的 UI 组件。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerRenderVideoFirstFrame ( String streamID ){ super . onPlayerRenderVideoFirstFrame ( streamID ); } }

                    监控视频分辨率的变化

                    回调捕获的视频分辨率的变化

                    要在捕获的视频大小发生变化时接收事件通知，请侦听onPublisherVideoSizeChanged回调。

                    推流开始后，SDK 会在截取视频的分辨率发生变化时通过该回调发出事件通知。

                    首次开启流发布或本地预览时，SDK引擎开始采集本地设备的视频数据，视频的分辨率同时发生变化。

                    您可以通过该回调移除本地视频预览视图中的UI元素，或者根据事件回调返回的分辨率动态调整本地预览视图的缩放比例。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherVideoSizeChanged ( int width , int height , ZegoPublishChannel channel ) { super . onPublisherVideoSizeChanged ( width , height , channel ); } }

                    播放视频分辨率变化的回调

                    要在播放的视频分辨率发生变化时接收事件通知，请监听onPlayerVideoSizeChanged回调。

                    流媒体播放开始后，当播放视频的分辨率发生变化时，SDK 通过该回调发出事件通知。 您可以根据视频流的最终分辨率调整视频显示。

                    • 播放纯音频流时，您不会收到任何通知。

                    • 如果流发布端由于网络问题触发了SDK内部的流量控制，可能会动态降低流发布端的代码区分度，SDK通过该回调发出通知。

                    • 当您播放的流的 UI 正在呈现时，SDK 会发出通知。 您可以使用此回调来更新或切换 UI 元素。

                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPlayerVideoSizeChanged ( String streamID , int width , int height ) { } }

                    通过 CDN 监控流转发的状态

                    要在指定的 CDN URL 更改（添加新 URL 或删除现有 URL）时接收事件通知，请侦听onPublisherRelayCDNStateUpdate回调。

                    通过这个回调可以判断转发到CDN的音视频流是否正常：

                    • 如果本次回调返回结果异常，则定位音视频流转发到CDN的原因，并进行容灾处理。
                    • 如果不知道异常原因，请联系ZEGO技术支持进一步分析。
                     engine . setEventHandler ( new IZegoEventHandler () { @Override public void onPublisherRelayCDNStateUpdate ( String streamID , ArrayList < ZegoStreamRelayCDNInfo > infoList ) { super . onPublisherRelayCDNStateUpdate ( streamID , infoList ); } }

                    流转发属性详解

                    流转发信息包括CDN URL、转发状态、流转发状态的原因、状态变化的时间。

                    您可以在本节中找到详细的属性定义：
